title: 2 Concrete & Aggregates Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Headwinds
text: Federal infrastructure spending should help the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry players to thrive. VMC and EXP should gain from a demand surge amid high costs.

title: VULCAN ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2022 CONFERENCE CALL
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , Jan. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE:VMC) will host its fourth quarter and full year 2022 earnings conference call on Thursday, February 16, 2023 at 10:00 a.m.

title: Vulcan (VMC) Rises 23.4% in 6 Months Despite Industry Woes
text: Higher public construction demand, favorable pricing dynamics and acquisition activity bode well for Vulcan Materials (VMC). However, supply-chain disruptions, inflationary pressure and inclement weather hurt.
